message: There's nothing more to ask, and it wouldn't bother me if I can't meet her.
I guess there's nothing I can do; I'll come back later.
Is she still not back? What a troublesome person, I wonder where she went.
needs to talk about Cindy before meeting.
I wonder what I should say.
are not the detective, what do you want?
Why did you come all this way? Didn't you say you never wanted to see that face again?
I just want to talk a bit.
What is it? Hurry up and say it.
No one else is here but me. I wonder how many men have been able to enter this room.
Normally, letting someone else in would be impossible,
it feels like a special room just for her to relax.
The furniture and decor don’t seem particularly expensive, but if she likes it, it's not my place to comment.
It seems she hasn't been drinking much today,
but she’s likely going to need more alcohol than ever from here on out.
As usual, she’s apparently naked under the gown. Is she always like this? Is she inviting me?
She’s taking off her makeup and relaxing. Actors rarely show their true faces to others, do I not matter?
What do you want? Did my daughter say she wanted to meet you?
Just so you know, there won't be a second time. If that's what you're after, look elsewhere.
What do you mean by that?
At that time, I was out of my mind. So, from now on,
I'm not going to do anything like get physical with you.
No, I didn't come here for that today.
I still haven't heard the story.
It's such a sudden conversation, I don't know what to say. My daughter was killed, and that daughter was Cindy.
I regret that I didn't tell you this from the beginning. I'm so sorry.
I can't believe that child was my daughter.
I don't know what to say.
No, my head is all mixed up.
No, I understand now why she couldn't make it to the meeting place that day.
What the hell was the reason?
What did you just say!? You said she was murdered!?
Wait a minute, why did my daughter have to be killed?
I don't know the reason. The police might come here about this issue eventually.
There's nothing I can say even if they come. I have never met them.
No, you have crossed paths with her without knowing. Your daughter was Cindy.
The celebrity? She was my daughter?
I can't believe Cindy was my daughter.
If only I had talked about Cindy.
It seems like they are bewildered by the sudden shocking news. If only I had said sooner she was my daughter.
It's too abrupt, and it seems they can't comprehend this situation. It would be useless for me to say anything.
If we had met as mother and daughter, would we have been happy, or would I have unleashed the resentment I held?
Now that she’s gone, there's nothing that can be done.
said my goodbyes and left the room.
